notices.agentWelcomeContent: Hello! I'm your intelligent creative assistant. You can adjust the creative parameters on the left while assigning advanced creative tasks anytime. For example: "Create a set of 3 cyberpunk warrior photos" or "Convert the previous image to a 16:9 short video". I'll provide suggestions and fill in parameters or execute generation after confirmation.
notices.agentWelcomeThought: Initializing bottom Agent Dock, preparing to read gallery asset context...
notices.agentFollowUp1: Optimize and generate a cyberpunk airship
notices.agentFollowUp2: I want to make a space sci-fi video
notices.agentFollowUp3: Give me three extension directions based on the current gallery
notices.agentReceivedInstruction: Instruction received, how should we proceed with this project?
notices.agentAnalysisThought: Analyzing scene, planning design synthesis steps...
notices.agentNetworkError: Sorry, Agent encountered an exception during network tuning ({message}). Please check your network, API Key, or retry.
notices.voiceProfileAudioMissing: Selected voice profile reference audio no longer exists

confirmDialogs.clearAssets: This will clear all assets in local IndexedDB (images, videos, audio, and transcripts). Files already downloaded to your device will not be affected. Board nodes and layouts will not be automatically cleared. Continue?
confirmDialogs.deleteSelectedItems: Are you sure you want to permanently delete the selected {count} creative asset(s) or task(s)?
confirmDialogs.deleteSingleItem: Are you sure you want to delete this creative item or task?
confirmDialogs.deleteTasksByStatus: Are you sure you want to delete {count} {statuses} task(s)?
confirmDialogs.cancelVideoTask: Are you sure you want to cancel this video generation task?
confirmDialogs.cancelLocalTask: Are you sure you want to cancel this task locally? The remote generation may still continue.
confirmDialogs.resetAllHistory: This will clear all generation history cards and cannot be undone!
